questions.question: Which of the following are good ways to grow as a content creator?
options: Speak only in English to grow
Stay true to your voice and values

questions.question: What is the difference between internal and external motivation?
options: External comes from others; internal comes from within
Internal depends on prizes; external depends on curiosity
Internal is about money; external is about dreams

questions.question: What change can help a person improve their learning routine?
options: Taking extra tutoring in all subjects
Using colorful flowcharts and recording audio explanations
Studying for longer hours without breaks

questions.question: Which of the following helps build emotional awareness over time?
options: Daily mindfulness, reflection, and naming feelings

questions.question: What is a sign of active listening during a disagreement?
options: Paraphrasing what the other person said
Using your phone while they talk

questions.question: What is the first step to changing a negative thought?
Which of the following is a workplace ethical action?
options: Speaking up respectfully against unfair behaviour

questions.question: What is the first step in managing emotions effectively?
options: Talking to a friend about it immediately
Reacting instantly to how you feel

questions.question: What is a common myth about creativity?
options: It can be taught only in an art school
It is an inborn gift, not something you can develop

questions.question: What key skill would a principal use when responding to a teacher's emotional breakdown?
What is the primary benefit of networking in professional growth?
Which technique is most effective for time management?
options: The Pomodoro Technique with focused intervals

questions.question: What defines a growth mindset?
options: Seeing challenges as opportunities to learn

questions.question: How can you improve problem-solving skills?
options: Practice breaking problems into smaller parts

questions.question: What role does a mentor play in career development?
Which habit builds resilience during setbacks?
options: Reflecting on lessons and moving forward

questions.question: What is key to effective public speaking?
options: Practice, confidence, and knowing your audience

questions.question: What makes a goal SMART?
How can you maintain work-life balance?
What is the benefit of seeking constructive feedback?
options: It helps identify improvement areas and grow
